MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present. Represented by Alex Zevelyov.
Attorney Daniel Cheung appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant John Henry is present.
Attorney Dany Pikman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of DEC-10-2012 is vacated.
